title: Principal

resourceType.description: FHIR-style discriminator naming this resource type; MUST equal the resource type name.

kind.description: The kind of acting party: a human user, a service, or an agent.

subject.description: Stable subject identifier for this principal, mappable to an OIDC `sub` claim.

issuer.description: Identifier of the asserting identity provider, mappable to an OIDC `iss` claim.

displayName.description: Human-readable display name, if asserted by the identity provider.

email.description: Email address, if asserted by the identity provider.

identity.description: The IdP-agnostic, OIDC-mappable claims-contract identity assertion.

scopeMemberships.description: The scopes this principal is a member of, used to resolve most-specific-scope-wins.

roles.description: IdP-agnostic role names asserted for this principal, independent of scope membership.

description: A first-class identity: the acting party behind every agent action.

PrincipalKind.description: The kind of acting party: a human user, a machine-to-machine service, or an agent acting on its own.

level.description: Which level of the tenant/workspace/user/group/role taxonomy this attachment point is at.

id.description: Identifier of the scoped entity (the tenant id, workspace id, user id, group id, or role id).

Scope.description: A generalized-ownership attachment point: a taxonomy level plus the identifier at that level.
